title: Porcelain Veneers
subtitle: Transform your smile with custom-crafted veneers
shortDescription: Custom porcelain veneers to correct chips, gaps, discoloration, and uneven teeth for a complete smile transformation.
fullDescription:
Porcelain veneers are one of the most versatile and effective cosmetic dental treatments available. These ultra-thin shells of medical-grade ceramic are custom-designed to fit over the front surface of your teeth, instantly correcting a wide range of aesthetic concerns including chips, cracks, gaps, severe discoloration, and minor misalignment.

At our Middletown, NY office, each set of veneers is individually crafted by a skilled dental ceramist to match the shape, size, and translucency of natural teeth. We work closely with you during the design phase to ensure the final result complements your facial features and achieves the look you envision, whether that is a subtle enhancement or a dramatic Hollywood smile.

The veneer process is completed over two visits. During the first appointment, we gently prepare your teeth by removing a thin layer of enamel, take detailed impressions, and place comfortable temporary veneers. At the second visit, your permanent porcelain veneers are carefully bonded into place and polished to a beautiful, natural-looking finish. With proper care, porcelain veneers can last 15 years or longer.
benefits: Correct multiple cosmetic issues in just two visits
Stain-resistant porcelain that maintains its brightness for years
Custom-designed to look completely natural and complement your features
Minimally invasive preparation that preserves most of your natural tooth structure
whatToExpect: Your veneer journey begins with a comprehensive consultation where we discuss your goals, examine your teeth, and may take photographs and digital scans for treatment planning. At the first treatment visit, we gently prepare your teeth by reshaping a small amount of enamel, take precise impressions, and help you select the ideal shade. Temporary veneers are placed so you can preview your new smile while the permanent veneers are being crafted at the lab, which typically takes about two weeks. At your second appointment, we remove the temporaries, try in the porcelain veneers for fit and appearance, make any final adjustments, and permanently bond them to your teeth. You will leave with a stunning, natural-looking smile.

faq.question: How long do porcelain veneers last?
faq.answer: With proper oral hygiene and regular dental checkups, porcelain veneers typically last 15 to 20 years. Avoiding habits like biting your nails, chewing ice, or using your teeth to open packaging will help protect your veneers and extend their lifespan.

faq.question: Do veneers look natural?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Modern porcelain veneers are crafted to mimic the light-reflecting properties of natural tooth enamel. Each veneer is custom-shaded and shaped to blend seamlessly with your smile. Most people will not be able to tell you have veneers.

faq.question: Can veneers fix crooked teeth?
faq.answer: Veneers can correct the appearance of mildly crooked or uneven teeth without the need for braces or aligners. For more significant alignment issues, we may recommend orthodontic treatment first to achieve the best possible result.
